```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.6em 1em 1.4em;border-radius:18px;text-align:center;">

 <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.14em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.7em;">anthropic's classic definition</div>

 <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.95em 1.4em;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:0.55em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:1em;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);margin-bottom:1.2em;">
  <span style="color:#2C3E50;font-weight:700;">Agent</span>
  <span style="color:#C4C3E8;">=</span>
  <span style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#E5F2EE,#C8E6C9);color:#2C8475;padding:0.2em 0.55em;border-radius:8px;font-weight:700;">LLM</span>
  <span style="color:#C4C3E8;">+</span>
  <span style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#FEF5E7,#FAE9C8);color:#C4881A;padding:0.2em 0.55em;border-radius:8px;font-weight:700;">Tools</span>
  <span style="color:#C4C3E8;">+</span>
  <span style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#EEEDF8,#D6D2EF);color:#5654A2;padding:0.2em 0.55em;border-radius:8px;font-weight:700;">Loop</span>
 </div>

 <div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;gap:0.4em;flex-wrap:wrap;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 0.8em;width:5em;box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(86,84,162,0.08);">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:1.2em;font-weight:900;color:#5654A2;line-height:1;opacity:0.25;">1</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.3;margin-top:-0.4em;">Pick tool</div>
  </div>

  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#9B8EA0;font-weight:700;">→</span>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 0.8em;width:5em;box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(44,132,117,0.08);">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:1.2em;font-weight:900;color:#2C8475;line-height:1;opacity:0.25;">2</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.3;margin-top:-0.4em;">Run it</div>
  </div>

  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#9B8EA0;font-weight:700;">→</span>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 0.8em;width:5em;box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(196,136,26,0.08);">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:1.2em;font-weight:900;color:#C4881A;line-height:1;opacity:0.25;">3</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.3;margin-top:-0.4em;">Read result</div>
  </div>

  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#9B8EA0;font-weight:700;">→</span>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 0.8em;width:5em;box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(212,95,71,0.08);">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:1.2em;font-weight:900;color:#D45F47;line-height:1;opacity:0.25;">4</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.3;margin-top:-0.4em;">Pick next</div>
  </div>

  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;margin-left:0.4em;">
   <div style="width:2em;height:2em;border-radius:50%;border:2px dashed #2C3E50;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.75em;color:#2C3E50;font-weight:700;">↻</div>
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
